MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_trails_form.Description: Describes whether data refers to TRAILS A or TRAILS B form

cnb_trails_rt.LongName: TRAILS Median Response Time for All Trials

cnb_trails_rtcr.LongName: TRAILS Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_trails_rter.LongName: TRAILS Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_trails_avg_rtcr.LongName: TRAILS Mean Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_trails_sd_rtcr.LongName: TRAILS Standard Deviation of Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_trails_avg_rter.LongName: TRAILS Mean Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_trails_sd_rter.LongName: TRAILS Standard Deviation of Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_trails_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Trailmaking Test B

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
